name: application_interview_scheduling

email.subject: Next steps for your application — Acme Corp
email.body_text:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for applying to the Forward Deployed Engineer role at Acme Corp. We'd like to schedule a 30-minute screening call. What does your availability look like next week?

Best,
The Acme Talent Team
